blocks.label: Strip & Pad Foundations
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall execute in-situ concrete foundation works:

Foundation type: {{foundationType}}
Concrete class: {{concreteClass}}
Exposure class: {{exposureClass}}
Reinforcement: {{reinforcementType}}

The Supplier shall:
- Supply and place formwork
- Supply, cut, bend, and fix reinforcement
- Supply, pour, compact, and cure concrete
- Strip formwork after curing
- Set anchor bolts and cast-in items per drawing

Estimated concrete volume: {{concreteVolume}} m³
Estimated reinforcement: {{rebarWeight}} kg

Finished levels per structural drawings. Tolerance: +/- {{levelTolerance}} mm.
Anchor bolt setting accuracy: +/- {{boltTolerance}} mm.

blocks.label: Floor Slab on Grade
Applicable Standards
blocks.text:
All works shall comply with:

- NEN-EN 206 (concrete specification)
- NEN-EN 13670 (execution of concrete structures)
- NEN-EN 1992-1-1 (Eurocode 2 — design of concrete structures)
- NEN-EN 10080 (reinforcing steel)
- NEN 8005 (NL national annex)

Concrete supplier shall be BFBN certified.
Reinforcement supplier shall provide 3.1 certificates per EN 10204.

Attach: concrete mix design, reinforcement certificates, formwork design (if required).

overrides.ch5_priceBreakdownItems:
Concrete:
- Per m³ concrete (supply, pour, compact, cure)
- Per m² formwork (supply, erect, strip)

Reinforcement:
- Per kg reinforcement (supply, cut, bend, fix)
- Per piece anchor bolt set (supply, template, fix)

Finishing:
- Per m² floor finishing (if applicable)

Mobilisation / demobilisation: lump sum
Pump hire: per pour session or per m³
overrides.ch5_surchargeItems:
- Rock or obstruction removal
- Additional pours beyond schedule
- Weekend / night concrete pours
- Accelerated curing
overrides.ch6_exclusionItems:
- Excavation (by others)
- Structural design (by STM engineer)
- Steel structure
- Backfill after foundation
- Waterproofing / tanking
- VAT
overrides.ch7_requiredDocuments:
1. Price schedule — per m³, per kg, per m²
2. Method statement
3. Concrete mix design proposal
4. Equipment list
5. BFBN certificate (concrete supplier)
6. Reinforcement 3.1 certificates
7. Estimated duration
8. General terms and conditions
9. All deviations with justification
